description: Composition Black and white checked shirt, made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, tipped collar, buttoned front placket, yoke at the back, contrast stitch detailing, embroidery on the left chest and at the back, patch pockets on the chest with a buttoned flap and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Your little one will love this shirt from doodle. The cotton fabric will keep him fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with shorts or jeans and comfy footwear for a stylish, casual look.
